Hi Flavia. Where is the head office?
The head office is in Sao Paulo, the capital of the state.
How many branches are there in the state?
There are thirty-three branches. One is at Campinas, near the highway.
Where can I see all the locations?
There is a big map on the wall. Every branch is on it.
And when is the annual meeting?
It is on March 15th, here in the capital.
Our head office is in Sao Paulo, the capital of the state.
Sebrae-SP has thirty-three branches in the state.
There is a big map on the wall of my office.
I have meetings at the branch in Campinas.
The annual meeting is on March 15th.

Hi Flavia, this is Bruno from the regional team. Here is the plan for our visits this month. On Monday, we go to the branch in Campinas, about one hundred kilometers from the capital. On Wednesday, we drive on the highway to Ribeirao Preto, in the north of the state, near the border with Minas Gerais. The big meeting is on March 15th, here in Sao Paulo. Please put these dates on your schedule. Thank you, and have a good trip.

Good morning, everyone. This is a short reminder about our map project. On the wall of the main office, there is a new map of the state with all thirty-three branches. Please check the location of your branch and the distance to the capital. The report with the numbers and the dates is due on the first of April. Remember, every branch is important, from the capital to the border. Thank you, and have a great week.

First, Flavia looks at the map on the wall of her office. She checks the location of each branch in the state. On Monday, she visits the branch in Campinas. On Wednesday, she drives on the highway to the north. The big meeting is on March 15th, in the capital.
